title: Make C TX queue reads thread-safe
description: tx_queue_count, tx_queue_empty, and tx_queue_stats_get read shared queue state without locking despite the thread-safe API contract; POSIX mutations can race and cause undefined behavior. Also audit and propagate pthread_mutex_init/destroy failures. Redesign const/read API locking without unsafe casts, add concurrent host tests and sanitizer/thread-sanitizer validation.
